Blueprint gives robot teams exact-site world models, site-package access, and hosted evaluation built from real indoor capture.

High-priority public URLs:
- /
- /how-it-works
- /world-models
- /pricing
- /faq
- /docs
- /contact
- /privacy
- /terms

Full content: /llms-full.txt

API endpoints:
- /api/site-content (public JSON summary of key pages and non-sensitive content)
